title: Health care practice managers
description: Transcribe medical reports recorded by physicians and other healthcare practitioners using various electronic devices, covering office visits, emergency room visits, diagnostic imaging studies, operations, chart reviews, and final summaries. Transcribe dictated reports and translate abbreviations into fully understandable form. Edit as necessary and return reports in either printed or electronic form for review and signature, or correction. Perform secretarial duties using specific knowledge of medical terminology and hospital, clinic, or laboratory procedures. Duties may include scheduling appointments, billing patients, and compiling and recording medical charts, reports, and correspondence.

tasks.task: Schedule and confirm patient diagnostic appointments, surgeries, medical consultations, and tests or procedures based on physician orders.
Compile and record medical charts, reports, or correspondence using typewriter or personal computer, including maintaining medical records, technical library, or correspondence files.

Take dictation using shorthand, a stenotype machine, or headsets and transcribe for a variety of medical reports, including patient histories, physical examinations, emergency room visits, operations, and discharge summaries.
Receive and screen telephone calls and visitors; greet visitors, ascertain the purpose of their visit, and direct them to the appropriate staff.
Decide which information should be included or excluded in reports and check for mistakes, ensuring accuracy in reports by consulting with doctors.
Perform a variety of clerical and office tasks, including handling mail, completing and submitting insurance claims, typing, filing, and operating office machines.
Set up and maintain medical files and databases, including records such as lab and procedure reports, medical histories, and clinical resumes.
Produce medical reports, correspondence, patient care information, and administrative material while editing for spelling, grammar, clarity, consistency, and proper medical terminology.
Translate medical jargon and abbreviations into expanded forms and ensure accurate documentation; return dictated reports in printed or electronic form for physician's review and corrections.
Perform data entry and retrieval services for inclusion in medical records and communication with physicians, including receiving and routing messages or documents.
Answer inquiries regarding the progress of medical cases within confidentiality limits.
Prepare correspondence or assist physicians or medical scientists with preparation of reports, speeches, articles, or conference proceedings.
Complete insurance or other claim forms.
Transmit correspondence or medical records by mail, e-mail, or fax.
Operate office equipment and use software applications to prepare reports, invoices, and letters.
Interview patients to complete forms such as intake or insurance forms.

technology_skills.name: Healthcare common procedure coding system HCPCS
MEDITECH Medical and Practice Management MPM Suite

detailed_work_activities.title: Perform clerical work in medical settings.
Interview employees, customers, or others to collect information.
Record vital statistics or other health information.
Prepare documentation for contracts, transactions, or regulatory compliance.
Communicate detailed medical information to patients or family members.
Answer telephones to direct calls or provide information.

related_occupations.related_uk_title: Health services and public health managers and directors
